compiled_state.title: Add sonnet dispatch sub-step 2a2 to sprint SKILL.md SC coverage gate
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add sub-step 2a2 to the Preplanning Gate section of `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md`, immediately after the haiku gate sub-step 2a1.

Sub-step 2a2 dispatches the sonnet tier for SCs haiku could not cite evidence for (escalated list). Sonnet receives only the original SC text and children descriptions — no haiku verdicts, no escalation reasoning. Sonnet returns COVERED / MISSING / UNSURE per SC. Any SCs marked UNSURE are collected into an escalation list for opus (sub-step 2a3).

## File Impact
- EDIT: `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` (Preplanning Gate section — add sub-step 2a2 after 2a1)

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Sub-step 2a2 appears in the Preplanning Gate section after sub-step 2a1
2. Sub-step 2a2 references `sc-coverage-sonnet.md` prompt
3. Input contract: original SC text + children descriptions only (no haiku verdicts)
4. Output contract: COVERED/MISSING/UNSURE per SC
5. UNSURE SCs are collected for opus escalation
6. Fail-open on parse failure (warn + treat as UNSURE)
7. The structural boundary test `test-sprint-sc-coverage-escalation.sh` check items 1-4 pass GREEN

## testing_mode
GREEN — test written in Task A (191e-d649); this task makes the test pass

## Dependencies
- Blocked by: 191e-d649 (RED test must be written first)
- Blocked by: 3b79-d74b (haiku gate sub-step 2a1 must exist in SKILL.md first)

## Done Definition
- SKILL.md edited with sub-step 2a2
- Structural test checks 1-4 pass GREEN
